title: 10 Herbal Preparations for Athletes to Overcome Asthma
description: Eucalyptus globulus tinctures are often used to help with asthma symptoms due to the presence of compounds like eucalyptol, limonene, and alpha-pinene, which have natural decongestant and anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help open up airways, making it easier to breathe and reducing inflammation in the lungs. The eucalyptol in Eucalyptus globulus tinctures also has a soothing effect on the mucous membranes, which can become irritated and inflamed in people with asthma. If ...
